seo.title: Push-Through Signs | Wholesale Sign Manufacturer | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale push-through signs with dimensional acrylic letters and LED backlighting. German-engineered, UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery. Trade pricing for sign shops only.

de.title: Durchsteck Signs | Großhandel Sign Manufacturer | Sunlite Signs
de.metaDescription: Großhandel Durchsteck signs with dimensional acrylic letters and LED backlighting. Mit deutscher Ingenieurskunst, UL 48 listed, 3-Wochen delivery. Händlerpreise for Schilderwerkstätten only.

data.subtitle: Dimensional acrylic letters pushed through precision-routed aluminum panels, creating elegant illuminated signage with soft, even backlighting. The premium alternative to flat-face cabinet signs.
data.image: Push-through sign — illuminated dimensional acrylic letters on routed aluminum panel

de.subtitle: Dimensional acrylic letters pushed through precision-routed aluminum panels, creating elegant illuminated signage with soft, even backlighting. The premium alternative to flat-face Leuchtkästen.

items.title: Elegant Illumination
items.description: Dimensional acrylic letters glow with soft, even illumination when backlit by LEDs, while the aluminum face panel remains opaque. A premium look that commands attention day and night.

items.title: Energy-Efficient LEDs
items.description: High-output LED modules rated at 50,000+ hours deliver uniform backlighting across every letter. Low energy consumption and maintenance-free operation reduce total cost of ownership.

items.title: Precision CNC Routing
items.description: Each aluminum face panel is CNC-routed with tolerances of +/- 0.010 inches, ensuring perfectly fitted letterforms and clean edges on every character for a flawless finished product.

items.title: Dimensional Impact
items.description: Push-through letters project from the sign face, creating a three-dimensional appearance that flat-face cabinet signs cannot match. Visible depth adds a premium, tactile quality to any storefront.

items.title: Unlimited Customization
items.description: Any font, any color, any panel finish. Choose from translucent and opaque acrylics, painted or powder-coated aluminum faces, and a full range of standard or custom finishes to match any brand.

items.title: UL 48 Listed
items.description: All illuminated push-through signs are UL 48 listed with proper labeling and documentation for code compliance, permitting, and inspection. Built to last with welded aluminum construction.

steps.title: Aluminum Panel Routing
steps.description: A CNC router precisely cuts each letterform into a heavy-gauge aluminum face panel. Tight tolerances ensure every character is dimensionally accurate to the approved artwork.

steps.title: Acrylic Letter Fabrication
steps.description: Cast acrylic letters are cut to match each routed opening. Available in translucent or opaque colors, the acrylic pieces are sized for a friction-fit push through the aluminum face.

steps.title: Assembly & LED Installation
steps.description: Letters are pressed through the panel from behind, projecting outward to create dimensional depth. LED modules are installed inside the cabinet for uniform backlighting of each character.

steps.title: Quality Inspection & Shipping
steps.description: Every sign undergoes a powered illumination test and full quality inspection before shipping. Units ship fully assembled and wired, ready for straightforward field installation.

data.heading: Why Choose Push-Through Signs?
data.content:
Push-through signs bridge the gap between standard cabinet signs and individual channel letters. They deliver a dimensional, illuminated look at a competitive price point, making them one of the most effective upsell opportunities for sign shops.

When backlit by LEDs, the acrylic letters glow with a soft, even illumination while the aluminum face panel remains opaque, creating a striking contrast that draws attention. The result is signage that looks custom and high-end without the complexity or cost of individual channel letters.
data.image: Push-through sign — detail of acrylic letters projecting through routed aluminum

de.heading: Why Choose Durchsteck Signs?
de.content:
Push-through signs bridge the gap between standard Leuchtkästen and individual Leuchtbuchstaben. They deliver a dimensional, illuminated look at a competitive price point, making them one of the most effective upsell opportunities for Schilderwerkstätten.

When backlit by LEDs, the acrylic letters glow with a soft, even illumination while the aluminum face panel remains opaque, creating a striking contrast that draws attention. The result is signage that looks custom and high-end without the complexity or cost of individual Leuchtbuchstaben.

data.heading: Common Applications
data.description: Push-through signs are popular across retail, hospitality, corporate, and healthcare sectors. Their dimensional elegance and soft illumination make them ideal for businesses that want premium-looking signage without the cost of channel letters.
